name: Baked Cajun Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb To 2 lb chicken, meaty (breasts, thighs, drumstick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin from chicken.
2. Rinse chicken and pat dry.
3. Spray a 13 by 9 by 2 inch baking dish with nonstick coating.
4. Arrange the chicken, meaty sides up, in the dish.
5. Brush with milk.
6. In a small bowl, mix onion powder, thyme, garlic salt, white pepper, and black pepper.
7. Sprinkle the mixture over the chicken.
8. Bake in a 375 degree oven for 45 to 55 minutes or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink.
Food Exhange per serving: 3 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGES
CHO: 77g; PRO: 25g; FAT: 6g; CAL: 166
Source: Better Homes and Garden Diabetic Cookbook
